title: Refactoring-as-Propositions: Proved Refactoring of Hybrid Systems via Proved Refinements
authors: Enguerrand Prebet, André Platzer
abstract: Cyber-physical systems are inherently complex due to their connection between software and the physical world. Iterative design reduces their complexity, but increases the need to repeatedly recheck their safety in full after every change. We introduce the refactoring-as-propositions principle in which refactorings are represented as propositions along with a method for proving that system refactorings preserve their required properties by transferring the proof along the respective modification. It is based on differential refinement logic (dRL), with which one can simultaneously and rigorously refer to properties of the systems and the relation between a refactored system and its original version. Refinements represent a uniform way of expressing different types of hybrid system refactorings, including those that introduce auxiliary variables. Furthermore, we show how these refactorings can be proved automatically, and/or reduce to a modular proof solely about the local change rather than about the whole system.
title_zh: 重构即命题：通过已验证的精化实现混合系统的已验证重构
abstract_zh: 网络物理系统因其软件与物理世界之间的连接而具有固有的复杂性。迭代设计虽然降低了其复杂性，但增加了每次变更后需全面重新检查系统安全性的需求。我们引入了“重构即命题”原则，其将重构表示为命题，并提供一种方法，通过沿相应修改传递证明来验证系统重构是否保持了所需属性。该方法基于微分精化逻辑（dRL），可同时且严谨地引用系统属性以及重构系统与其原始版本之间的关系。精化提供了一种表达不同类型混合系统重构的统一方式，包括引入辅助变量的重构。此外，我们展示了如何自动验证这些重构，以及/或将证明简化为仅关于局部变化而非整个系统的模块化证明。

title: Viverra: Text-to-Code with Guarantees
authors: Haoze Wu, Rocky Klopfenstein, Keith Farkas, Nina Narodytska
abstract: A fundamental limitation of Text-to-Code is that no guarantee can be obtained about the correctness of the generated code. Therefore, to ensure its correctness, the generated code still has to be reviewed, tested, and maintained by developers. However, parsing through LLM-generated code can be tedious and time-consuming, potentially negating the productivity gains promised by AI-coding tools. To address this challenge, we present Viverra, a system that automatically produces formally verified annotations alongside generated code to aid user's understanding of the generated program. Given a natural-language task description, Viverra prompts an LLM to synthesize a C program together with candidate assertions expressing safety and correctness properties. It then verifies those assertions in a compositional and best-effort manner via a portfolio of bounded model checkers. Evaluation on 18 diverse programming tasks suggests that Viverra can efficiently generate code with verified assertions, and that these assertions improve users' performance on code-comprehension tasks in a user study with more than 400 participants.
title_zh: Viverra：具有保证的文本到代码转换
abstract_zh: 文本转代码的一个根本局限在于无法保证所生成代码的正确性。因此，为确保代码正确，仍需由开发者进行审查、测试和维护。然而，人工解析LLM（大语言模型）生成的代码可能既繁琐又耗时，甚至可能抵消AI编码工具承诺的生产力提升。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了Viverra系统，该系统能在生成代码的同时自动提供经形式化验证的注释，以帮助用户理解所生成的程序。给定自然语言的任务描述后，Viverra会提示LLM综合生成一段C语言程序，并附带表达安全性与正确性属性的候选断言。随后，它通过一组有界模型检查器，以组合式、尽力而为的方式对这些断言进行验证。针对18项不同编程任务的评估表明，Viverra能够高效生成附带已验证断言的代码；而在一项有超过400名参与者参与的用户研究中，这些断言提升了用户在代码理解任务上的表现。

title: GenCircuit-RL: Reinforcement Learning from Hierarchical Verification for Genetic Circuit Design
authors: Noah Flynn
abstract: Genetic circuit design remains a laborious, expert-driven process despite decades of progress in synthetic biology. We study this problem through code generation: models produce Python code in pysbol3 to construct genetic circuits in the Synthetic Biology Open Language (SBOL), a formal representation that supports automated verification. We introduce GenCircuit-RL, a reinforcement learning framework built around hierarchical verification rewards that decompose correctness into five levels, from code execution to task-specific topological checks, and a four-stage curriculum that shifts optimization pressure from code generation to functional reasoning. We also introduce SynBio-Reason, a benchmark of 4,753 circuits spanning six canonical circuit types and nine tasks from code repair to de novo design, with held-out biological parts for out-of-distribution evaluation. Hierarchical verification improves task success on functional reasoning tasks by 14 to 16 percentage points over binary rewards, and curriculum learning is required for strong design performance. The resulting models generate topologically correct circuits, generalize to novel biological parts, and rediscover canonical designs from the synthetic biology literature.
title_zh: GenCircuit-RL: 基于分层验证的强化学习用于基因电路设计
abstract_zh: 尽管合成生物学已经取得了数十年的进展，基因电路设计仍然是一个劳动密集型、依赖专家的过程。我们通过代码生成来研究这一问题：模型使用pysbol3生成Python代码，以在合成生物学开放语言（SBOL）中构建基因电路，SBOL是一种支持自动验证的正式表示。我们提出了GenCircuit-RL，这是一个围绕分层验证奖励构建的强化学习框架，该框架将正确性分解为五个层次，从代码执行到特定于任务的拓扑检查，并采用四阶段课程，将优化压力从代码生成转移到功能推理。我们还引入了SynBio-Reason基准测试，包含4,753个电路，涵盖六种典型电路类型和九个任务（从代码修复到从头设计），并配有预留的生物部件用于分布外评估。分层验证使功能推理任务的成功率比二元奖励提高了14到16个百分点，而课程学习对于实现强大的设计性能是必需的。最终生成的模型能够生成拓扑正确的电路，泛化到新的生物部件，并从合成生物学文献中重新发现典型设计。

title: Not All RAGs Are Created Equal: A Component-Wise Empirical Study for Software Engineering Tasks
authors: Qiang Ke, Yanjie Zhao, Hongjin Leng, Shengming Zhao, Haoyu Wang
abstract: While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is increasingly adopted to ground Large Language Models (LLMs) in software artifacts, the optimal configuration of its components remains an open question for software engineering (SE) tasks. The lack of systematic guidance forces practitioners into costly, ad-hoc experimentation. This paper presents a comprehensive, component-wise empirical study that dissects the RAG pipeline, evaluating over 21 distinct models and methods. Our study systematically isolates and evaluates 4 query processing techniques, 7 retrieval models spanning sparse, dense, and hybrid paradigms, 4 context refinement methods, and 6 distinct generators. We test these components on a suite of 3 core SE tasks: code generation, summarization, and repair. Our empirical findings reveal a crucial insight: the retriever-side components, particularly the choice of the retrieval algorithm, often exert a more significant influence on final system performance than the selection of the generator model. Strikingly, the classic lexical retriever BM25 demonstrates exceptionally robust performance across diverse tasks. Our analysis provides a practical, data-driven roadmap for researchers and practitioners, offering clear guidance on prioritizing optimization efforts when constructing effective RAG systems for software engineering contexts.
title_zh: 并非所有RAG都生而平等：针对软件工程任务的组件级实证研究
abstract_zh: 尽管检索增强生成（RAG）越来越被用于将大型语言模型（LLMs）与软件工件相结合，但其组件的最优配置对于软件工程（SE）任务而言仍是一个开放性问题。缺乏系统化的指导迫使从业者进行成本高昂的临时性实验。本文提出了一项全面的、组件层面的实证研究，深入剖析了RAG流水线，评估了超过21种不同的模型和方法。我们的研究系统性地分离并评估了4种查询处理技术、7种涵盖稀疏、密集和混合范式的检索模型、4种语境精化方法和6种不同的生成器。我们在3项核心SE任务（代码生成、代码摘要和代码修复）上对这些组件进行了测试。实证结果揭示了一个关键洞察：检索器侧的组件，特别是检索算法的选择，往往对最终系统性能的影响比生成器模型的选择更为显著。令人惊讶的是，经典的词法检索器BM25在不同任务中展现了异常稳健的性能。我们的分析为研究人员和从业者提供了一份基于数据驱动的实用路线图，为在构建软件工程场景下的有效RAG系统时如何优先优化工作提供了清晰指导。

title: When Retrieval Hurts Code Completion: A Diagnostic Study of Stale Repository Context
authors: Haojun Weng, Qianqian Yang, Hao Fu, Haobin Pan, Xinwei Lv
abstract: Context: Retrieval-augmented code generation relies on cross-file repository context, but retrieved snippets may come from obsolete project states. Objectives: We study whether temporally stale repository snippets act as harmless noise or actively induce current-state-incompatible code. Methods: We conduct a controlled diagnostic study on a curated 17-sample set of production-helper signature changes from five Python repositories. For each sample, we compare current-only, stale-only, no-retrieval, and mixed current/stale retrieval conditions under prompts that hide commit freshness and expected current signatures. Results: Under neutralized prompts, stale-only retrieval induces stale helper references on 15/17 Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct samples and 13/17 gpt-4.1-mini samples, corresponding to 88.2 and 76.5 percentage-point increases over current-only retrieval. No retrieval produces zero stale references but only 1/17 passing completions. The two models share 75.0% Jaccard overlap among stale-triggering samples, and mixed conditions show that adding valid current evidence largely rescues stale-only failures. Conclusion: Temporal validity of retrieved repository context is a distinct diagnostic variable for Code RAG robustness: stale context can actively bias models toward obsolete repository state rather than merely removing useful evidence.
title_zh: 当检索损害代码补全时：一个关于过时仓库上下文的诊断研究
abstract_zh: 背景：检索增强代码生成依赖于跨文件的仓库上下文，但检索到的代码片段可能来自过时的项目状态。目标：我们研究时间上过时的仓库代码片段是作为无害噪声，还是主动诱导生成与当前状态不兼容的代码。方法：我们在五个Python仓库中选取了17个生产级辅助函数签名变更样本，进行对照诊断研究。针对每个样本，我们在提示中隐藏提交新鲜度和预期当前签名的情况下，比较了仅当前、仅过时、无检索以及当前/过时混合检索条件下的生成结果。结果：在中立化提示下，仅过时检索导致Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct模型在15/17的样本中、gpt-4.1-mini模型在13/17的样本中生成了过时辅助函数引用，较仅当前检索分别提升了88.2和76.5个百分点。无检索条件下未产生过时引用，但仅有1/17的生成通过编译。两个模型在触发过时行为的样本上Jaccard重叠率为75.0%，混合条件表明添加有效的当前上下文在很大程度上能挽救仅过时检索的失败。结论：检索到的仓库上下文的时间有效性是代码RAG鲁棒性的一个独特诊断变量：过时上下文不仅会移除有用证据，还会主动使模型偏向过时的仓库状态。

title: FuzzAgent: Multi-Agent System for Evolutionary Library Fuzzing
authors: Yunlong Lyu, Peng Chen, Fengyi Wu, Junzhe Yu, Kit Long Hon, Hao Chen
abstract: Library fuzzing is essential for hardening the software supply chain, but adopting it at scale remains expensive. Practitioners still spend substantial effort on environment setup, struggle to generate harnesses that respect intricate API constraints, and lack reliable means to tell genuine library bugs from harness-induced crashes. Recent LLM-based systems automate parts of this pipeline, yet they typically operate as one-shot code generators that ignore runtime feedback, which limits both the depth of code they reach and the validity of the bugs they report. We argue that effective library fuzzing is iterative by nature: each campaign exposes new coverage bottlenecks and crashes, and the next campaign should evolve from these signals rather than restart from scratch. Building on this insight, we present FuzzAgent, a multi-agent system that turns library fuzzing into an evolutionary process, in which a team of specialized agents collaborates over the full fuzzing lifecycle and grounds every decision in concrete runtime evidence, so that the harness suite is successively refined toward deeper coverage and higher-fidelity crash analysis across rounds. We evaluate FuzzAgent on 20 real-world C/C++ libraries against four state-of-the-art baselines (OSS-Fuzz, OSS-Fuzz-Gen, PromptFuzz, and PromeFuzz). FuzzAgent completes the full fuzzing lifecycle for all 20 libraries without human intervention and reaches 179619 branches, exceeding OSS-Fuzz, PromptFuzz, PromeFuzz, and OSS-Fuzz-Gen by 45.1%, 73.2%, 92.1%, and 191.2%, respectively. FuzzAgent also identifies 102 genuine library bugs, 78 of which have already been acknowledged and fixed by upstream maintainers.
title_zh: FuzzAgent：用于进化式库模糊测试的多智能体系统
abstract_zh: 库模糊测试对于加固软件供应链至关重要，但大规模采用仍成本高昂。实践者仍需在环境搭建上投入大量精力，努力生成符合复杂API约束的测试工具，并且缺乏可靠手段来区分真正的库错误与测试工具引发的崩溃。近期基于大语言模型的系统虽能自动化部分流程，但它们通常作为一次性代码生成器运行，忽略了运行时反馈，这既限制了其代码覆盖深度，也降低了报告错误的可靠性。我们认为，有效的库模糊测试本质上是迭代的：每次测试活动都会暴露出新的覆盖瓶颈和崩溃，而下一轮测试应基于这些信号演进，而非从头开始。基于这一洞察，我们提出了FuzzAgent——一个多智能体系统，它将库模糊测试转变为进化过程：由一组专业智能体协作完成整个模糊测试生命周期，每次决策都基于具体的运行时证据，从而在轮次间不断优化测试工具套件，以实现更深覆盖和更高保真度的崩溃分析。我们在20个真实世界的C/C++库上，针对四个最先进的基线系统（OSS-Fuzz、OSS-Fuzz-Gen、PromptFuzz和PromeFuzz）进行了评估。FuzzAgent无需人工干预即可完成所有20个库的完整模糊测试生命周期，覆盖了179,619个分支，分别超过OSS-Fuzz、PromptFuzz、PromeFuzz和OSS-Fuzz-Gen达45.1%、73.2%、92.1%和191.2%。FuzzAgent还识别了102个真正的库错误，其中78个已被上游维护者确认并修复。

title: Coding Agent Is Good As World Simulator
authors: Hongyu Wang, Jingquan Wang, Bocheng Zou, Radu Serban, Dan Negrut
abstract: World models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for building interactive simulation environments, with recent video-based approaches demonstrating impressive progress in generating visually plausible dynamics. However, because these models typically infer dynamics from video and represent them in latent states, they do not explicitly enforce physical constraints. As a result, the generated video rollouts are not physically plausible, exhibiting unstable contacts, distorted shapes, or inconsistent motion. In this paper, we present an agentic framework constructing physics-based world models through executable simulation code. The framework coordinates planning, code generation, visual review, and physics analysis agents. The planning agent converts the natural language prompt into a structured scene plan, the code agent implements it as executable simulation code, and the visual review agent provide visual feedback while the physics analysis agent checks physical consistency. The code is iteratively revised based on the feedback until the simulation matches the prompt reqirements and physical constraints. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms advanced video-based models in physical accuracy, instruction fidelity and visual quality, which could be applied to various scenarios including driving simulation and embodied robot tasks.
title_zh: 编程代理作为世界模拟器表现良好
abstract_zh: 世界模型已成为构建交互式仿真环境的强大范式，近期基于视频的方法在生成视觉上合理的动态行为方面取得了显著进展。然而，由于这些模型通常从视频中推断动态行为并以潜在状态表示，它们并未明确施加物理约束。因此，生成的视频推演在物理上缺乏合理性，会出现不稳定的接触、变形的形状或运动不一致等问题。本文提出了一种基于智能体的框架，通过可执行的仿真代码构建基于物理的世界模型。该框架协调规划、代码生成、视觉审查和物理分析智能体：规划智能体将自然语言提示转换为结构化的场景方案，代码智能体将其实现为可执行的仿真代码，视觉审查智能体提供视觉反馈，而物理分析智能体则检查物理一致性。代码会根据反馈进行迭代修正，直到仿真满足提示要求及物理约束。实验结果表明，我们的框架在物理准确性、指令忠实度和视觉质量方面均优于先进的基于视频的模型，可应用于驾驶仿真、具身机器人任务等多种场景。

title: Natural Synthesis: Outperforming Reactive Synthesis Tools with Large Reasoning Models
authors: Frederik Schmitt, Matthias Cosler, Niklas Metzger, Julian Siber, Vladimir Krsmanovic, Mohamed Ghanem, Bernd Finkbeiner
abstract: Reactive synthesis, the problem of automatically constructing a hardware circuit from a logical specification, is a long-standing challenge in formal verification. It is elusive for two reasons: It is algorithmically hard, and writing formal specifications by hand is notoriously difficult. In this paper, we tackle both sides of the problem. For the algorithmic side, we present a neuro-symbolic approach to reactive synthesis that couples large reasoning models with model checkers to iteratively repair a synthesized Verilog implementation via sound symbolic feedback. Our approach solves more benchmarks than the best dedicated tools in the annual synthesis competition and extends to constructing parameterized systems, a problem known to be undecidable. On the specification side, we introduce an autoformalization step that shifts the specification task from temporal logic to natural language by introducing a hand-authored dataset of natural-language specifications for evaluation. We demonstrate performance comparable to that of starting from formal specifications, establishing natural synthesis as a viable end-to-end workflow.
title_zh: 自然合成：使用大型推理模型超越反应式合成工具
abstract_zh: 反应式综合——即从逻辑规范自动构建硬件电路的问题，是形式验证领域长期存在的挑战。其难点源于两方面：算法复杂度高，且人工编写形式规范本身就极为困难。本文从这两个角度切入问题。在算法层面，我们提出了一种神经符号方法，将大型推理模型与模型检验器相结合，通过合理的符号化反馈对合成的Verilog实现进行迭代修复。相较于年度综合竞赛中的最优专用工具，我们的方法能解决更多基准测试，并可扩展至构建参数化系统——这一此前被认为不可判定的问题。在规范层面，我们引入自动形式化步骤，通过手工标注的自然语言规范数据集，将规范任务从时序逻辑转向自然语言。实验表明，其性能可与从形式规范出发的方法相媲美，从而将自然语言综合确立为可行的端到端工作流。

title: Factorization-Error-Free Discrete Diffusion Language Model via Speculative Decoding
authors: Xun Fang, Yunchen Li, Hang Yuan, Zhou Yu
abstract: Discrete diffusion language models improve generation efficiency through parallel token prediction, but standard $X_0$ prediction methods introduce factorization errors by approximating the clean token posterior with independent token-wise distributions. This paper proposes Factorization-Error-Free Discrete Diffusion Language Modeling (FeF-DLLM), which replaces independent clean-token prediction with an exact prefix-conditioned factorization of the clean posterior to better preserve token dependencies. To reduce the sequential cost introduced by prefix conditioning, FeF-DLLM further incorporates speculative decoding within diffusion denoising, accelerating inference while maintaining the parallel prediction and re-masking properties of DLLMs. Theoretically, we prove that FeF-DLLM generates from the true joint distribution and derive its expected acceleration ratio. Experiments on GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval, and MBPP demonstrate that our method improves accuracy by an average of 5.04 percentage points while achieving an average inference speedup of $3.86\times$.
title_zh: 基于推测解码的无因子化误差离散扩散语言模型
abstract_zh: 离散扩散语言模型通过并行令牌预测提高了生成效率，但标准的$X_0$预测方法因采用独立的逐令牌分布近似干净令牌后验分布，引入了分解误差。本文提出无分解误差的离散扩散语言建模（FeF-DLLM），该方法用精确的前缀条件分解替代独立的干净令牌预测，以更好地保留令牌依赖性。为降低前缀条件引入的序列代价，FeF-DLLM进一步在扩散去噪中融入推测解码，在保持离散扩散语言模型并行预测与重掩码特性的同时加速推理。理论上，我们证明了FeF-DLLM从真实联合分布中生成，并推导出其预期的加速比。在GSM8K、MATH、HumanEval和MBPP上的实验表明，我们的方法平均准确率提升5.04个百分点，同时推理速度平均提升3.86倍。

title: Do Coding Agents Understand Least-Privilege Authorization?
authors: Zheng Yan, Jingxiang Weng, Charles Chen, Dengyun Peng, Ethan Qin, Jiannan Guan, Jinhao Liu, Qiming Yu, Yixin Yuan, Fanqing Meng, Carl Che, Mengkang Hu
abstract: As coding agents gain access to shells, repositories, and user files, least-privilege authorization becomes a prerequisite for safe deployment: an agent should receive enough authority to complete the task, without unnecessary authority that exposes sensitive surfaces.To study whether current models can infer this boundary themselves, we first introduce permission-boundary inference, where a model maps a task instruction and terminal environment to a file-level read/write/execute policy, and AuthBench, a benchmark of 120 realistic terminal tasks with human-reviewed permission labels and executable validators for utility and attack outcomes.AuthBench shows that authorization is not a simple conservative-versus-permissive calibration problem: frontier models often omit permissions required by the execution chain while also granting unused or sensitive accesses.Increasing inference-time reasoning does not resolve this mismatch. Instead, each model moves toward a model-specific authorization attractor: more reasoning makes it more consistent in its own failure mode, whether broad-but-exposed or tight-but-brittle.This suggests that direct policy generation is the bottleneck, because a single generation must both discover all necessary accesses and reject all unnecessary ones.We therefore propose Sufficiency-Tightness Decomposition, which first generates a coverage-oriented policy by forward-simulating the task and then audits each granted entry for grounding and sensitivity.Across tested models, this decomposition improves sensitive-task success by up to 15.8% on tightness-biased models while reducing attack success across all evaluated models.
title_zh: 编码代理是否理解最小权限授权？
abstract_zh:
随着编码智能体获得对shell、代码仓库以及用户文件的访问权限，最小权限授权成为安全部署的前提条件：智能体应获取足以完成任务所需的权限，同时避免暴露敏感面而授予不必要的权限。

为研究当前模型能否自主推断这一边界，我们首先引入权限边界推断任务，即模型需根据任务指令与终端环境生成文件级别的读/写/执行策略；同时构建AuthBench基准，包含120个真实终端任务及其经人工审核的权限标签和用于验证效用与攻击结果的可执行验证器。

AuthBench表明，授权并非简单的保守与冒进校准问题：前沿模型时常遗漏执行链所需的权限，同时却授予未使用或敏感的访问权限。

增加推理时间无法解决这一错配。相反，每个模型会趋向一个模型特定的授权吸引子：推理量越大，模型在其自身失败模式上就越一致——无论是“宽泛但易暴露”还是“严谨但脆弱”。

这表明直接策略生成是瓶颈所在，因为单次生成既要发现所有必要访问权限，又要拒绝所有非必要权限。

因此，我们提出充分性与紧致性分解方法：先通过正向模拟任务生成覆盖导向的策略，再对每条授权条目进行基于依据和敏感性的审计。

在测试的模型中，该分解方法在偏紧模型的敏感任务成功率上最高提升15.8%，同时降低所有评估模型的攻击成功率。

title: Documentation-Guided Agentic Codebase Migration from C to Rust
authors: Minh Le-Anh, Anh Nguyen Hoang, Bach Le, Nghi D. Q. Bui
abstract: Migrating legacy C repositories to Rust promises stronger memory safety, but existing translators often work at the level of files or functions and miss architectural intent. We present RustPrint, a documentation-guided agentic framework for repository-level C-to-Rust migration. RustPrint first converts the source repository into architecture-aware documentation and treats it as a migration blueprint capturing module structure, data flow, APIs, and design rationale. Coding agents then use this blueprint to plan crates, implement modules, check compilability, reduce unsafe code, and iteratively refine the translated repository. RustPrint next compares documentation from the Rust output against the source documentation and uses mismatches as repair signals. It also translates and runs source test suites so runtime failures can guide targeted fixes. Experiments on eight real-world C repositories ranging from 11K to 84K LoC show that RustPrint compiles every target under both an open-weight (Kimi-K2-Instruct) and a closed-weight (GPT-5.4) backbone, while prior LLM-based translators (Self-Repair, EvoC2Rust) fail repository-wide. With the open-weight Kimi-K2-Instruct backbone, RustPrint exceeds an agentic Claude Code baseline on feature preservation (93.26% vs. 52.52%) and on cross-evaluation test pass rate (95.17% vs. 79.85%). These results suggest that documentation-guided coordination is a useful direction for scalable codebase migration.
title_zh: 从C到Rust的文档引导代理式代码库迁移
abstract_zh: 将遗留C语言仓库迁移到Rust有望增强内存安全性，但现有翻译工具往往局限于文件或函数级别，忽略了架构意图。我们提出RustPrint——一种文档引导的智能体框架，用于仓库级别的C到Rust迁移。RustPrint首先将源仓库转换为架构感知文档，并将其作为迁移蓝图，捕获模块结构、数据流、API和设计原理。随后，编码智能体利用该蓝图规划crate、实现模块、检查编译正确性、减少unsafe代码，并迭代优化翻译后的仓库。接着，RustPrint对比Rust输出文档与源文档的差异，将不一致之处作为修复信号。同时，它翻译并运行源测试套件，使运行时故障能够指导针对性修复。在8个真实C仓库（代码行数从1.1万到8.4万）上的实验表明：无论采用开源权重模型（Kimi-K2-Instruct）还是闭源权重模型（GPT-5.4），RustPrint均能成功编译每个目标仓库，而此前基于LLM的翻译器（Self-Repair、EvoC2Rust）无法完成全仓库迁移。使用开源Kimi-K2-Instruct模型时，RustPrint在特征保持率（93.26%对比52.52%）和交叉测试通过率（95.17%对比79.85%）上均超越基于智能体的Claude Code基线。这些结果表明，文档引导的协同机制是规模化代码仓库迁移的有效方向。

title: Articraft: An Agentic System for Scalable Articulated 3D Asset Generation
authors: Matt Zhou, Ruining Li, Xiaoyang Lyu, Zhaomou Song, Zhening Huang, Chuanxia Zheng, Christian Rupprecht, Andrea Vedaldi, Shangzhe Wu
abstract: A bottleneck in learning to understand articulated 3D objects is the lack of large and diverse datasets. In this paper, we propose to leverage large language models (LLMs) to close this gap and generate articulated assets at scale. We reduce the problem of generating an articulated 3D asset to that of writing a program that builds it. We then introduce a new agentic system, Articraft, that writes such programs automatically. We design a programmatic interface and harness to help the LLM do so effectively. The LLM writes code against a domain-specific SDK for defining parts, composing geometry, specifying joints, and writing tests to validate the resulting assets. The harness exposes a restricted workspace and interface to the LLM, validates the resulting assets, and returns structured feedback. In this way, the LLM is not distracted by details such as authoring a URDF file or managing a complex software environment. We show that this produces higher-quality assets than both state-of-the-art articulated-asset generators and general-purpose coding agents. Using Articraft, we build Articraft-10K, a curated dataset of over 10K articulated assets spanning 245 categories, and show its utility both for training models of articulated assets and in downstream applications such as robotics simulation and virtual reality.
title_zh: Articraft：可扩展铰接式3D资产生成的智能体系统
abstract_zh: 在学习理解铰接三维物体的过程中，一个瓶颈是缺乏大规模且多样化的数据集。本文提出利用大型语言模型（LLMs）来弥补这一不足，并大规模生成铰接物体资产。我们将生成铰接三维物体资产的问题简化为编写一个构建它的程序。为此，我们引入了一个新的智能体系统——Articraft，它能自动编写此类程序。我们设计了一套程序化接口和工具，以帮助LLM高效地完成这一任务。LLM将针对一个领域特定SDK编写代码，该SDK用于定义部件、组合几何形状、指定关节，并编写测试以验证生成的资产。该工具为LLM提供了一个受限的工作空间和接口，验证生成的资产，并返回结构化反馈。通过这种方式，LLM不会因制作URDF文件或管理复杂软件环境等细节而分心。我们证明，这种方法生成的资产质量优于当前最先进的铰接资产生成器和通用编码智能体。利用Articraft，我们构建了Articraft-10K，这是一个包含超过10K个铰接资产且涵盖245个类别的精选数据集，并展示了其在铰接资产模型训练以及机器人仿真、虚拟现实等下游应用中的实用价值。

title: Learning from Failures: Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization with Verifiable Rewards
authors: Mengjie Ren, Jie Lou, Boxi Cao, Xueru Wen, Hongyu Lin, Xianpei Han, Le Sun, Xing Yu, Yaojie Lu
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. However, RLVR training is often hindered by sparse binary rewards and weak credit assignment, resulting in ambiguous optimization signals and underutilization of the useful information embedded in failed trajectories. To address this challenge, we propose Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization (CIPO), a simple and effective extension to RLVR that converts on-policy failed trajectories into correction-oriented supervision, without relying on any external signals. By jointly optimizing correction samples derived from the model's own failed attempts together with the standard RLVR objective, CIPO improves learning effectiveness while explicitly enhancing the model's ability to correct its own errors. Extensive experiments across 11 benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that CIPO consistently and significantly outperforms strong baselines in both reasoning and correction performance. Moreover, CIPO yields stronger pass@K gains, indicating that it improves the model's intrinsic reasoning capacity rather than merely redistributing probability mass over existing correct answers.
title_zh: 从失败中学习：基于可验证奖励的纠偏策略优化
abstract_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已成为提升大语言模型推理能力的有效范式。然而，RLVR训练常受稀疏的二元奖励与薄弱的信用分配所困扰，导致优化信号模糊且未能充分利用失败轨迹中的有用信息。为应对这一挑战，我们提出纠正导向策略优化（CIPO），这是一种对RLVR的简单而有效的扩展，它将在线策略下的失败轨迹转化为纠正导向的监督信号，无需依赖任何外部信号。通过联合优化模型自身失败尝试中衍生的纠正样本与标准RLVR目标，CIPO在提升学习效率的同时，明确增强了模型自我纠错的能力。涵盖数学推理与代码生成的11个基准的广泛实验表明，CIPO在推理与纠错性能上均持续且显著优于强基线。此外，CIPO带来了更强的pass@K增益，这表明其提升了模型的内在推理能力，而不仅仅是重新分配现有正确答案上的概率质量。

title: Exploiting LLM Agent Supply Chains via Payload-less Skills
authors: Xinyu Liu, Yukai Zhao, Xing Hu, Xin Xia
abstract: Autonomous agents powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) acquire external functionalities through third-party skills available in open marketplaces. Adopting these integrations broadens the potential attack surface, prompting a need for systematic security evaluation. Current auditing mechanisms are effective at identifying explicit code payloads and predefined threat contents through security scanning. These detection mechanisms are bypassed if malicious behaviors lack direct injection and are instead synthesized dynamically at runtime through the agent's inherent generative capabilities. Exploring this blind spot, we introduce Semantic Compliance Hijacking (SCH), a payload-less supply chain attack targeting autonomous coding environments. The SCH approach translates malicious goals into unstructured natural language instructions formatted as necessary compliance rules, leading the agent to generate and execute unauthorized code. To assess the real-world viability of this attack, we developed an automated pipeline to evaluate its effectiveness across a test matrix comprising three mainstream agent frameworks and three distinct foundation models using contextualized scenarios. The findings demonstrate the pervasive nature of this threat, with SCH achieving peak success rates of up to 77.67% for confidentiality breaches and 67.33% for Remote Code Execution (RCE) under the most vulnerable configurations. Furthermore, the introduction of Multi-Skill Automated Optimization (MS-AO) further boosted attack efficacy. By omitting recognizable Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) signatures and explicit harmful intents, the manipulated skill files maintained a 0.00% detection rate, evading current scanning tools. This research highlights an underexplored attack surface within agent supply chains, pointing to a necessary transition from signature-based detection models toward semantic intent validation.
title_zh: 利用无载荷技能攻击LLM代理供应链
abstract_zh: 由大型语言模型（LLM）驱动的自主代理通过开放市场中的第三方技能获得外部功能。采用这些集成方式扩大了潜在攻击面，因此需要进行系统性的安全评估。当前的审计机制能够通过安全扫描有效识别显式代码载荷和预定义威胁内容。但如果恶意行为不包含直接注入，而是通过代理自身的生成能力在运行时动态合成，这些检测机制就会被绕过。针对这一盲点，我们提出了一种无载荷的供应链攻击——语义合规劫持（SCH），其目标直指自主编码环境。SCH方法将恶意目标转化为非结构化的自然语言指令，并将其格式化为必要的合规规则，从而引导代理生成并执行未授权代码。为评估该攻击在现实场景中的可行性，我们构建了一个自动化流水线，在包含三种主流代理框架和三种不同基础模型的测试矩阵中，利用情景化场景评估其有效性。研究结果揭示了这一威胁的普遍性：在最易受攻击的配置下，SCH在机密性破坏方面达到了高达77.67%的成功率，在远程代码执行（RCE）方面达到了67.33%。此外，引入多技能自动化优化（MS-AO）进一步提升了攻击效能。由于省略了可识别的抽象语法树（AST）签名和显式有害意图，被操控的技能文件保持了0.00%的检测率，成功规避了现有扫描工具。这项研究揭示了代理供应链中一个未被充分探索的攻击面，表明有必要从基于签名的检测模型转向语义意图验证。

title: LEMON: Learning Executable Multi-Agent Orchestration via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning
authors: Xudong Chen, Yixin Liu, Hua Wei, Kaize Ding
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become a strong foundation for multi-agent systems, but their effectiveness depends heavily on orchestration design. Across different tasks, role design, capacity assignment, and dependency construction jointly affect both solution quality and execution efficiency. Existing approaches automate parts of this design process, yet they often optimize these decisions partially or sequentially, and rely on execution-level feedback that provides limited credit assignment for local orchestration decisions. We propose LEMON (\textbf{L}earning \textbf{E}xecutable \textbf{M}ulti-agent \textbf{O}rchestratio\textbf{N} via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning), an LLM-based orchestrator that generates an executable orchestration specification. The specification integrates task-specific roles, customized duties, capacity levels, and dependency structure into a single deployable system. To train the orchestrator, we augment the orchestration-level GRPO objective with a localized counterfactual signal that edits role, capacity, or dependency fields and applies the resulting reward contrast only to the edited spans. Experiments on six reasoning and coding benchmarks, including MMLU, GSM8K, AQuA, MultiArith, SVAMP, and HumanEval, show that LEMON achieves state-of-the-art performance among the evaluated multi-agent orchestration methods. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LEMON-B23C.
title_zh: LEMON：通过反事实强化学习学习可执行的多智能体编排
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已成为多智能体系统的坚实基础，但其有效性高度依赖于编排设计。在不同任务中，角色设计、容量分配和依赖关系构建共同影响解决方案的质量和执行效率。现有方法自动化了部分设计过程，但通常以部分或顺序方式优化这些决策，并依赖执行层面的反馈，这种反馈对局部编排决策的信用分配有限。我们提出LEMON（基于反事实强化学习的可执行多智能体编排学习），这是一种基于LLM的编排器，可生成可执行的编排规范。该规范将任务特定角色、定制职责、容量级别和依赖结构整合到单个可部署系统中。为训练编排器，我们通过局部化反事实信号增强了编排级别的GRPO目标函数，该信号编辑角色、容量或依赖字段，并将由此产生的奖励对比仅应用于被编辑的片段。在六个推理和编码基准测试（包括MMLU、GSM8K、AQuA、MultiArith、SVAMP和HumanEval）上的实验表明，LEMON在评估的多智能体编排方法中达到了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LEMON-B23C 获取。

title: Mat2Boundary: Treating User-Defined Boundary Condition as SpMV for Distributed PDE Solvers on Block-Structured Grids
authors: Yanzheng Cai, Mingzhe Zhang, Shengqi Chen, Haoyuan Song, Wenguang Chen
abstract: Boundary-condition (BC) handling is a major source of complexity in PDE solvers on structured and block-structured grids, especially for high-order methods and distributed-memory execution. We present Mat2Boundary, a DSL and compiler for boundary computations that models a broad class of boundary-conditions as affine sparse linear operators. This abstraction unifies halo copying, circular and symmetric mappings, zero padding, block-edge synchronization, and user-defined interpolation, while exposing a modular basic sub-matrix interface for declarative composition. To make this representation efficient, Mat2Boundary combines multi-stage programming and polyhedral analysis to generate matrix-free kernels for structured cases, support user-defined sparse matrices for irregular cases, eliminate redundant boundary work, and synthesize reusable communication schedules for distributed execution. Evaluated on two shallow-water equation solvers on cubed-sphere grids and HPCG, Mat2Boundary achieves up to 7.6$\times$ BC-kernel speedup, reduces BC code by over 70%, and scales to 1,344 CPU cores with 72%-88% efficiency.
title_zh: Mat2Boundary：将用户定义边界条件作为SpMV用于块结构化网格上的分布式PDE求解器
abstract_zh: 边界条件处理是结构化及块结构化网格上偏微分方程求解器的一大复杂性来源，尤其对于高阶方法和分布式内存执行而言。我们提出Mat2Boundary——一种面向边界计算的领域特定语言与编译器，将广泛类型的边界条件建模为仿射稀疏线性算子。该抽象统一了光环复制、循环与对称映射、零填充、块边缘同步以及用户自定义插值，同时提供模块化的基本子矩阵接口用于声明式组合。为提升表示效率，Mat2Boundary结合多阶段编程与多面体分析，为结构化情形生成无矩阵内核，支持非结构化情形下的用户自定义稀疏矩阵，消除冗余边界计算，并为分布式执行合成可复用的通信调度方案。在立方球网格上的两个浅水方程求解器及HPCG基准测试中，Mat2Boundary实现了最高7.6倍的边界条件内核加速，减少超过70%的边界代码，并在1344个CPU核心上以72%-88%的效率进行扩展。

title: Learning to Build the Environment: Self-Evolving Reasoning RL via Verifiable Environment Synthesis
authors: Yucheng Shi, Zhenwen Liang, Kishan Panaganti, Dian Yu, Wenhao Yu, Haitao Mi
abstract: We pursue a vision for self-improving language models in which the model does not merely generate problems or traces to imitate, but constructs the environments that train it. In zero-data reasoning RL, this reframes self-improvement from a data-generation loop into an environment-construction loop, where each artifact is a reusable executable object that samples instances, computes references, and scores responses. Whether this vision sustains improvement hinges on a single property: the environments must exhibit stable solve--verify asymmetry, the model must be able to write an oracle once that it cannot reliably execute in natural language on fresh instances. This asymmetry takes two complementary forms. Some tasks are algorithmically hard to reason through but trivial as code: a dynamic program or graph traversal, compiled once, yields unboundedly many calibrated instances. Others are intrinsically hard to solve but easy to verify, like planted subset-sum or constraint satisfaction. Both create a durable gap between proposing and solving that the policy cannot close by gaming the verifier, and it is this gap that keeps reward informative as the learner improves. We instantiate this view in EvoEnv, a single-policy generator, solver method that synthesizes Python environments from ten seeds and admits them only after staged validation, semantic self-review, solver-relative difficulty calibration, and novelty checks. The strongest evidence comes from the already-strong regime: on Qwen3-4B-Thinking, fixed public-data RLVR and fixed hand-crafted environment RLVR reduce the average, while EvoEnv improves it from 72.4 to 74.8, a relative gain of 3.3%. Stable self-improvement, we suggest, depends not on producing more synthetic data, but on models learning to construct worlds whose difficulty stays structurally beyond their own reach.
title_zh: 学习构建环境：通过可验证环境合成的自我进化推理强化学习
abstract_zh: 我们追求的愿景是构建一种能自我改进的语言模型——模型不只是生成供模仿的问题或痕迹，而是主动构造出能训练自身的学习环境。在零数据推理强化学习（zero-data reasoning RL）中，这相当于把自我改进从“数据生成循环”重构为“环境构造循环”：每个产物都是一个可复用的可执行对象，负责采样实例、计算参考答案，并对模型回答进行评分。这一愿景能否持续推动进步，取决于一个关键属性：环境必须表现出稳定的“求解-验证不对称性”——模型必须有能力一次性编写出一个“预言机”（oracle），但它却无法在新的实例上依靠自然语言可靠地执行它。这种不对称性以两种互补的形式存在。有些任务在算法层面难以通过推理完成，但用代码实现却轻而易举——比如一个动态规划或图遍历算法，只需编译一次，就能源源不断地产生大量经过校准的实例。另一些任务则本质上是求解困难但验证简单，例如植入式的子集和问题（subset-sum）或约束满足问题。这两种情况都在“提出方案”与“真正求解”之间制造了一道持久的鸿沟，而策略无法通过“欺骗验证器”来填补这道鸿沟。正是这道鸿沟，确保了奖励信号在学习者不断进步的过程中始终具有信息量。我们将这一理念具体化为EvoEnv——一种“单策略生成器-求解器”方法，它从十个种子出发，合成Python环境，并在经过阶段性验证、语义自我审查、与求解器相关的难度校准以及新颖性检查之后，才正式接纳这些环境。最强有力的证据来自本身已经很强的场景：在Qwen3-4B-Thinking模型上，使用固定公开数据的RLVR（基于强化学习的验证器奖励）和固定手工环境的RLVR都导致平均分下降，而EvoEnv却将平均分从72.4提升至74.8，相对提升了3.3%。我们由此认为，稳定的自我改进并不依赖于生成更多的合成数据，而在于让模型学会构建那些在结构性上始终超出自身能力范围的“困难世界”。

title: Making OpenAPI Documentation Agent-Ready: Detecting Documentation and REST Smells with a Multi-Agent LLM System
authors: Rayfran Rocha Lima, Davi G. Assunção Pinheiro, Thiago Medeiros de Menezes
abstract: The growing adoption of AI agents and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) has motivated organizations to expose existing REST APIs as agent-consumable tools. In our industrial context, this initiative targeted an ecosystem of 16 production APIs comprising approximately 600 endpoints. Although these APIs were stable and widely used within a microservice architecture, early proof-of-concept experiments revealed systematic failures in task planning, tool selection, and payload construction when accessed through MCP-based agents. Rather than attributing these failures to model limitations alone, we conducted an ecosystem-scale empirical assessment of the underlying OpenAPI documentation. We developed Hermes, a multi-agent LLM-based system that detects documentation and REST-related smells at the endpoint level and generates explainable diagnostic reports. The large-scale evaluation identified 2,450 smells across 600 endpoints, with deficiencies present in all analyzed operations. Practitioner validation confirmed high agreement with the detected issues while also revealing contextual trade-offs in remediation decisions. The findings suggested that structural validity within microservice environments does not guarantee semantic readiness for agent-based consumption. Based on this evidence, the organization revised its adoption strategy, prioritizing selective endpoint adaptation, redefining documentation standards, and integrating automated documentation assessment into API governance workflows. This case illustrates how systematic artifact-level evaluation can function as a strategic decision-support mechanism, reducing technological risk and guiding evidence-based AI adoption in industrial software ecosystems.
title_zh: 使OpenAPI文档具备Agent就绪性：基于多Agent大语言模型系统检测文档与REST异味
abstract_zh: 随着AI代理和模型上下文协议（MCP）的日益普及，许多组织开始将现有REST API转化为可供代理使用的工具。在我们所处的工业环境中，这一举措涉及一个包含16个生产环境API、约600个端点的生态系统。尽管这些API在微服务架构中运行稳定且被广泛使用，但早期概念验证实验表明，当通过基于MCP的代理访问时，系统在任务规划、工具选择以及载荷构建方面出现了系统性故障。我们并未仅将这些问题归因于模型本身的局限性，而是对整个生态系统的底层OpenAPI文档进行了大规模实证评估。为此，我们开发了Hermes——一个基于多智能体大语言模型的系统，能够从端点级别检测文档与REST相关的不良实践，并生成可解释的诊断报告。大规模评估结果显示，在600个端点中发现了2450个不良实践，所有被分析的操作均存在缺陷。从业者验证表明，系统检测到的问题与实际情况高度吻合，同时揭示了在修复决策中的情境权衡。研究结果表明，微服务环境中的结构有效性并不能保证其具备面向代理消费的语义就绪性。基于这一证据，该组织调整了其采纳策略，优先进行选择性端点适配，重新定义文档标准，并将自动化文档评估纳入API治理工作流程。此案例说明了系统化的制品级评估如何作为战略决策支持机制，降低技术风险，并指导工业软件生态系统中基于证据的AI采纳。

title: Learning from Language Feedback via Variational Policy Distillation
authors: Yang Li, Erik Nijkamp, Semih Yavuz, Shafiq Rayhan Joty
abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) suffers from sparse outcome signals, creating severe exploration bottlenecks on complex reasoning tasks. Recent on-policy self-distillation methods attempt to address this by utilizing language feedback to generate dense, token-level supervision. However, these approaches rely on a fixed, passive teacher to interpret the feedback. As the student policy improves, the teacher's zero-shot assessment capabilities plateau, ultimately halting further learning. To overcome this, we propose Variational Policy Distillation (VPD), a framework that formalizes learning from language feedback as a Variational Expectation-Maximization (EM) problem. VPD co-evolves both policies: in the E-step, the teacher is actively refined on trajectory outcomes via an adaptive trust-region update, translating textual feedback into a dynamically improved target token distribution. In the M-step, the student internalizes this dense distributional guidance on its own on-policy rollouts. By continuously improving the teacher's ability to extract actionable signals from textual critique, VPD overcomes the limitations of passive distillation. Evaluated across diverse sources of diagnostic feedback on scientific reasoning and code generation tasks, VPD consistently outperforms both standard RLVR and existing self-distillation baselines. Finally, by stress-testing our framework on rigid mathematical reasoning and cold-start regimes, we illuminate the fundamental bounds of feedback-driven self-distillation compared to pure environment-driven RL.
title_zh: 通过变分策略蒸馏从语言反馈中学习
abstract_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）面临稀疏结果信号的挑战，在复杂推理任务中造成了严重的探索瓶颈。近期提出的在线策略自蒸馏方法试图通过利用语言反馈生成密集的、词元级别的监督信号来解决这一问题。然而，这些方法依赖于一个固定的、被动的教师模型来解读反馈。随着学生策略的改进，教师模型的零样本评估能力趋于停滞，最终阻碍了进一步的学习。为了克服这一局限，我们提出了变分策略蒸馏（VPD）框架，该框架将基于语言反馈的学习形式化为一个变分期望最大化（EM）问题。VPD使两种策略协同进化：在E步中，教师模型通过自适应信任域更新，依据轨迹结果被主动优化，将文本反馈转化为动态改进的目标词元分布；在M步中，学生模型在其自身的在线策略 rollout 中内化这一密集的分布指导。通过持续提升教师模型从文本批评中提取可操作信号的能力，VPD克服了被动蒸馏的局限性。在科学推理和代码生成任务中，针对多种来源的诊断性反馈进行评估，VPD始终优于标准的RLVR和现有的自蒸馏基线方法。最后，通过对刚性数学推理和冷启动场景下的框架进行压力测试，我们揭示了与纯环境驱动强化学习相比，反馈驱动自蒸馏的基本边界。

title: PickleFuzzer: A Case Study in Fuzzing for Discrepancies Between Python Pickle Implementations
authors: Justin Applegate, Andreas Kellas
abstract: Python's native serialization protocol, pickle, is a powerful but insecure format for transferring untrusted data. It is frequently used, especially for saving machine learning models, despite known security challenges. While developers sometimes mitigate this risk by restricting imports during unpickling or using static and dynamic analysis tools, these approaches are error-prone and depend heavily on accurate interpretations of the Pickle Virtual Machine (PVM) opcodes. Discrepancies across Python's three native PVM modules can lead to incorrect detection of malicious payloads and undermine existing defenses. To efficiently and scalably identify discrepancies, we present PickleFuzzer, a custom generation-based fuzzer that identifies inconsistencies across pickle implementations. PickleFuzzer generates pickle objects, passes them to each implementation, and detects differences in thrown exceptions or changes to key internal states. It generates pickle objects using a grammar, which we developed to account for the missing pickle specification. It determines discrepancies by comparing the execution behaviors of each test implementation, rather than requiring a specification-derived oracle. PickleFuzzer detected 14 new discrepancies between the pickle implementations. Four discrepancies are critical and can be used to bypass security-critical scanning tools like those deployed on the popular model hosting platform, Hugging Face. We disclosed all findings to the Python Software Foundation for remediation, and additionally disclosed the security issues to a bug bounty platform and were awarded a $750 bounty. We demonstrate that differential testing is a viable approach for identifying security-relevant discrepancies in important pickle implementations, and our work can lead to promising future directions for finding deeper pickle bugs with more directed fuzzing.
title_zh: PickleFuzzer：Python Pickle实现之间模糊测试差异的案例研究
abstract_zh: Python原生的序列化协议pickle是一种强大但不安全的格式，用于传输不可信数据。尽管存在已知的安全隐患，它仍被广泛使用，尤其是在保存机器学习模型时。开发者有时会通过在反序列化时限制导入或使用静态与动态分析工具来缓解这种风险，但这些方法容易出错，且高度依赖于对Pickle虚拟机(PVM)操作码的准确解读。Python原生三大PVM模块之间的差异可能导致恶意负载检测不当，从而削弱现有防御机制。为高效、可扩展地识别这些差异，我们提出了PickleFuzzer，一种基于生成的定制化模糊测试工具，专门用于发现pickle实现之间的不一致性。PickleFuzzer生成pickle对象并将其传递给各个实现，通过对比抛出的异常或关键内部状态的变化来检测差异。它基于我们为弥补缺失的pickle规范而开发的语法来生成pickle对象。与依赖规范推导的预言机不同，它通过比较每个测试执行的运行行为来确定差异。PickleFuzzer在pickle实现之间发现了14个新的差异，其中4个为关键差异，可用于绕过类似流行模型托管平台Hugging Face部署的、对安全至关重要的扫描工具。我们已将所有发现报告给Python软件基金会以进行修复，同时将安全问题报告给漏洞赏金平台，并获得了750美元的奖金。我们的工作证明了差异测试是识别重要pickle实现中与安全相关差异的可行方法，并为未来通过更具针对性的模糊测试发现更深层pickle漏洞指明了方向。

title: Orchard: An Open-Source Agentic Modeling Framework
authors: Baolin Peng, Wenlin Yao, Qianhui Wu, Hao Cheng, Xiao Yu, Rui Yang, Tao Ge, Alessandrio Sordoni, Xingdi Yuan, Yelong Shen, Pengcheng He, Tong Zhang, Zhou Yu, Jianfeng Gao
abstract: Agentic modeling aims to transform LLMs into autonomous agents capable of solving complex tasks through planning, reasoning, tool use, and multi-turn interaction with environments. Despite major investment, open research remains constrained by infrastructure and training gaps. Many high-performing systems rely on proprietary codebases, models, or services, while most open-source frameworks focus on orchestration and evaluation rather than scalable agent training. We present Orchard, an open-source framework for scalable agentic modeling. At its core is Orchard Env, a lightweight environment service providing reusable primitives for sandbox lifecycle management across task domains, agent harnesses, and pipeline stages. On top of Orchard Env, we build three agentic modeling recipes. Orchard-SWE targets coding agents. We distill 107K trajectories from MiniMax-M2.5 and Qwen3.5-397B, introduce credit-assignment SFT to learn from productive segments of unresolved trajectories, and apply Balanced Adaptive Rollout for RL. Starting from Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking, Orchard-SWE achieves 64.3% on SWE-bench Verified after SFT and 67.5% after SFT+RL, setting a new state of the art among open-source models of comparable size. Orchard-GUI trains a 4B vision-language computer-use agent using only 0.4K distilled trajectories and 2.2K open-ended tasks. It achieves 74.1%, 67.0%, and 64.0% success rates on WebVoyager, Online-Mind2Web, and DeepShop, respectively, making it the strongest open-source model while remaining competitive with proprietary systems. Orchard-Claw targets personal assistant agents. Trained with only 0.2K synthetic tasks, it achieves 59.6% pass@3 on Claw-Eval and 73.9% when paired with a stronger ZeroClaw harness. Collectively, these results show that a lightweight, open, harness-agnostic environment layer enables reusable agentic data, training recipes, and evaluations across domains.
title_zh: 果园：一个开源智能体建模框架
abstract_zh: 智能体建模旨在将大语言模型转变为自主智能体，使其能够通过规划、推理、工具使用以及与环境的多次交互来解决复杂任务。尽管投入了大量资源，但开放研究仍受限于基础设施和训练方面的差距。许多高性能系统依赖专有代码库、模型或服务，而大多数开源框架则侧重于编排与评估，而非可扩展的智能体训练。我们提出Orchard，一个用于可扩展智能体建模的开源框架。其核心是Orchard Env，一个轻量级环境服务，为跨任务领域、智能体适配器与管线阶段的沙箱生命周期管理提供可复用原语。在Orchard Env之上，我们构建了三种智能体建模方案。Orchard-SWE针对编码智能体。我们从MiniMax-M2.5和Qwen3.5-397B中蒸馏出107K条轨迹，引入信用分配监督微调（credit-assignment SFT）以从未解决轨迹的有效片段中学习，并应用平衡自适应展开（Balanced Adaptive Rollout）进行强化学习。以Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking为起点，Orchard-SWE在SWE-bench Verified上经SFT后达到64.3%，经SFT+RL后达到67.5%，在同等规模的开源模型中创下新纪录。Orchard-GUI仅使用0.4K蒸馏轨迹和2.2K开放任务训练了一个4B视觉语言计算机使用智能体。它在WebVoyager、Online-Mind2Web和DeepShop上分别达到74.1%、67.0%和64.0%的成功率，成为最强开源模型，同时与专有系统保持竞争力。Orchard-Claw针对个人助理智能体。仅使用0.2K合成任务训练，它在Claw-Eval上达到59.6%的pass@3，当与更强的ZeroClaw适配器配合使用时达到73.9%。综合来看，这些结果表明，一个轻量级、开放、与适配器无关的环境层能够跨领域实现可复用的智能体数据、训练方案和评估。

title: COTCAgent: Preventive Consultation via Probabilistic Chain-of-Thought Completion
authors: Zihan Deng, Xiaozhen Zhong, Chuanzhi Xu
abstract: As large language models empower healthcare, intelligent clinical decision support has developed rapidly. Longitudinal electronic health records (EHR) provide essential temporal evidence for accurate clinical diagnosis and analysis. However, current large language models have critical flaws in longitudinal EHR reasoning. First, lacking fine-grained statistical reasoning, they often hallucinate clinical trends and metrics when quantitative evidence is textually implied, biasing diagnostic inference. Second, non-uniform time series and scarce labels in longitudinal EHR hinder models from capturing long-range temporal dependencies, limiting reliable clinical reasoning. To address the above limitations, this work presents the Probabilistic Chain-of-Thought Completion Agent (COTCAgent), a hierarchical reasoning framework for longitudinal electronic health records. It consists of three core modules. The Temporal-Statistics Adapter (TSA) converts analytical plans into executable code for standardized trend output. The Chain-of-Thought Completion (COTC) layer leverages a symptom-trend-disease knowledge base with weighted scoring to evaluate disease risk, while the bounded completion module acquires structured evidence through standardized inquiries and iterative scoring constraints to ensure rigorous reasoning. By decoupling statistical computation, feature matching, and language generation, the framework eliminates reliance on complex multi-modal inputs and enables efficient longitudinal record analysis with lower computational overhead. Experimental results show that COTCAgent powered by Baichuan-M2 achieves 90.47% Top-1 accuracy on the self-built dataset and 70.41% on HealthBench, outperforming existing medical agents and mainstream large language models. The code is available at https://github.com/FrankDengAI/COTCAgent/.
title_zh: COTCAgent：通过概率链式思考补全的预防性咨询
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型赋能医疗领域，智能临床决策支持系统发展迅速。纵向电子健康记录（EHR）为精确的临床诊断与分析提供了关键的时间序列证据。然而，现有的大型语言模型在纵向EHR推理中存在关键缺陷。首先，缺乏细粒度的统计推理能力，当定量证据以文本隐含方式呈现时，模型常对临床趋势和指标产生幻觉，从而偏离诊断推理方向。其次，纵向EHR中非均匀时间序列和稀缺标签导致模型难以捕获长期时间依赖性，限制了可靠临床推理。为解决上述局限，本文提出了概率链式思考补全智能体（COTCAgent），一种面向纵向电子健康记录的层次化推理框架。该框架包含三个核心模块：时序统计适配器（TSA）将分析计划转化为可执行代码，实现标准化趋势输出；链式思考补全（COTC）层利用症状-趋势-疾病知识库结合加权评分评估疾病风险；而边界补全模块通过标准化询问与迭代评分约束获取结构化证据，确保推理严谨性。通过解耦统计计算、特征匹配和语言生成，该框架消除了对复杂多模态输入的依赖，并以较低计算开销实现高效的纵向记录分析。实验结果表明，基于百川M2的COTCAgent在自建数据集上达到90.47%的Top-1准确率，在HealthBench上达到70.41%，优于现有医疗智能体及主流大型语言模型。代码开源地址：https://github.com/FrankDengAI/COTCAgent/。

title: Adapting AlphaEvolve to Optimize Fully Homomorphic Encryption on TPUs
authors: Shruthi Gorantala, Jianming Tong, Asra Ali, Baiyu Li, Jonathan Katz, Jeremy Kun, Thomas Steinke, Abhradeep Thakurta, Julian Walker, Amir Yazdanbakhsh
abstract: The deployment of Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) at scale is hindered due to its heavy computational overhead. While specialized hardware accelerators like Google Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) can help, mapping complex cryptographic kernels onto such architectures remains a challenge. Efficient execution requires co-optimization between the systolic array-based Matrix Multiplication Unit (MXU) and Vector Processing Units (VPUs), as well as the orchestration of data movement across the vector register files. Existing compiler stacks often abstract low-level hardware utilization, requiring developers to adopt a manual trial-and-error process that often results in fragmented execution and underutilized resources. To accelerate this development process, we use AlphaEvolve to automate the exploration of hardware-aware cryptographic-kernel optimizations. We frame optimization as an evolutionary search problem, utilizing the closed-loop system provided by AlphaEvolve, that leverages LLM-driven code generation. We use real-world feedback from hardware execution and rigorous correctness testing to guide the evolution process. We evaluate AlphaEvolve optimization on primitives for both the TFHE (Jaxite) and CKKS (CROSS) FHE schemes on Google Cloud TPUv5e, a contemporary TPU architecture. Within 24 hours of automated exploration, AlphaEvolve discovered implementation-level optimizations that improve TFHE bootstrap latency by 2.5x and CKKS rotation and multiplication latency by 1.31x and 1.18x, respectively, relative to human-engineered state of the art. These results demonstrate that AlphaEvolve can be used to enable researchers to navigate the optimization trade-offs between cryptography, compilers, and hardware accelerators.
title_zh: 将AlphaEvolve适配用于优化TPU上的全同态加密
abstract_zh: 大规模部署全同态加密（FHE）因其巨大的计算开销而受阻。尽管谷歌张量处理单元（TPUs）等专用硬件加速器能提供帮助，但将复杂的加密内核映射至此类架构仍是一大挑战。高效执行需要基于脉动阵列的矩阵乘法单元（MXU）与向量处理单元（VPU）之间的协同优化，以及向量寄存器文件间数据移动的编排。现有的编译器栈往往抽象了底层硬件利用率，迫使开发者采用手动试错过程，这常导致执行碎片化和资源利用不足。为加速这一开发流程，我们利用AlphaEvolve自动化探索硬件感知的加密内核优化。我们将优化问题建模为演化搜索问题，借助AlphaEvolve提供的闭环系统，该系统利用大模型驱动的代码生成。我们采用硬件执行的实际反馈及严格的正确性测试来指导演化过程。我们在谷歌云TPUv5e（一种当代TPU架构）上，针对TFHE（Jaxite）和CKKS（CROSS）这两种FHE方案的基元评估了AlphaEvolve的优化效果。在24小时自动探索内，相较于人工优化的现有最优方案，AlphaEvolve发现的实现级优化使TFHE自举延迟提升2.5倍，CKKS旋转和乘法延迟分别提升1.31倍和1.18倍。这些结果表明，AlphaEvolve可用于帮助研究人员在密码学、编译器和硬件加速器之间权衡优化策略。

title: Test-Time Learning with an Evolving Library
authors: Weijia Xu, Alessandro Sordoni, Chandan Singh, Zelalem Gero, Michel Galley, Xingdi Yuan, Jianfeng Gao
abstract: We introduce EvoLib, a test-time learning framework that enables large language models to accumulate, reuse, and evolve knowledge across problem instances without parameter updates or external supervision. Instead of adapting model parameters, our approach maintains a shared library of knowledge abstractions, including modular skills and reflective insights, automatically extracted from the model's own inference trajectories. To support continual improvement, we introduce a principled weighting and consolidation mechanism that jointly optimizes for immediate utility and long-term value. This allows simple, instance-specific abstractions to evolve into more general and reusable ones over time. Across challenging benchmarks in mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multi-turn agentic environments, EvoLib improves substantially over the top test-time scaling and learning methods without ground-truth feedback.
title_zh: 测试时学习与演化库
abstract_zh: 我们提出了EvoLib，一种测试时学习框架，使大型语言模型能够在无需参数更新或外部监督的情况下，跨问题实例积累、重用和演化知识。我们的方法不调整模型参数，而是维护一个共享的知识抽象库，包括模块化技能和反思性见解，这些内容自动从模型自身的推理轨迹中提取。为了实现持续改进，我们引入了一种原则性的加权与整合机制，同时优化即时效用与长期价值，使得简单、实例特定的抽象能够随着时间演化为更通用、可重用的抽象。在数学推理、代码生成和多轮智能体环境的挑战性基准测试中，EvoLib在没有真实反馈的情况下，显著优于顶级的测试时扩展和学习方法。

title: FrontierSmith: Synthesizing Open-Ended Coding Problems at Scale
authors: Runyuan He, Qiuyang Mang, Shang Zhou, Kaiyuan Liu, Hanchen Li, Huanzhi Mao, Qizheng Zhang, Zerui Li, Bo Peng, Lufeng Cheng, Tianfu Fu, Yichuan Wang, Wenhao Chai, Jingbo Shang, Alex Dimakis, Joseph E. Gonzalez, Alvin Cheung
abstract: Many real-world coding challenges are open-ended and admit no known optimal solution. Yet, recent progress in LLM coding has focused on well-defined tasks such as feature implementation, bug fixing, and competitive programming. Open-ended coding remains a weak spot for LLMs, largely because open-ended training problems are scarce and expensive to construct. Our goal is to synthesize open-ended coding problems at scale to train stronger LLM coders. We introduce FrontierSmith, an automated system for iteratively evolving open-ended problems from existing closed-ended coding tasks. Starting from competitive programming problems, FrontierSmith generates candidate open-ended variants by changing the problems'goals, restricting outputs, and generalizing inputs. It then uses a quantitative idea divergence metric to select problems that elicit genuinely diverse approaches from different solvers. Agents then generate test cases and verifiers for the surviving candidates. On two open-ended coding benchmarks, training on our synthesized data yields substantial gains over the base models: Qwen3.5-9B improves by +8.82 score on FrontierCS and +306.36 (Elo-rating-based performance) on ALE-bench; Qwen3.5-27B improves by +12.12 and +309.12, respectively. The synthesized problems also make agents take more turns and use more tokens, similar to human-curated ones, suggesting that closed-ended seeds can be a practical starting point for long-horizon coding data.
title_zh: FrontierSmith：大规模合成开放式编程问题
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的编码挑战是开放式的，且没有已知的最优解。然而，近年来大语言模型（LLM）编码能力的进步主要集中在定义明确的任务上，例如功能实现、错误修复和竞技编程。开放式编码仍是LLM的薄弱环节，这主要是因为开放式训练问题稀缺且构建成本高昂。我们的目标是规模化合成开放式编码问题，以训练更强大的LLM编码者。为此，我们提出了FrontierSmith——一个从现有封闭式编码任务中迭代演化开放式问题的自动化系统。该系统以竞技编程问题为起点，通过改变问题目标、限制输出和泛化输入来生成候选开放式变体，随后利用定量化观点发散度指标筛选出能促使不同求解者产生真正多样化方法的问题。最后，智能体为保留的候选问题生成测试用例和验证器。在两个开放式编码基准测试中，基于合成数据进行的训练带来了显著提升：Qwen3.5-9B在FrontierCS上提升了+8.82分，在ALE-bench上提升了+306.36（基于Elo评分的性能）；Qwen3.5-27B则分别提升了+12.12和+309.12。这些合成问题还促使智能体进行更多轮次交互并消耗更多标记，与人工策划的问题表现相似，这表明封闭式种子问题可作为长周期编码数据生成的实用起点。

title: SWE-Chain: Benchmarking Coding Agents on Chained Release-Level Package Upgrades
authors: Man Ho Lam, Chaozheng Wang, Hange Liu, Jingyu Xiao, Haau-sing Li, Jen-tse Huang, Terry Yue Zhuo, Michael R. Lyu
abstract: Coding agents powered by large language models are increasingly expected to perform realistic software maintenance tasks beyond isolated issue resolution. Existing benchmarks have shifted toward realistic software evolution, but they rarely capture continuous maintenance at the granularity of package releases, where changes are bundled, shipped, and inherited by subsequent versions. We present SWE-Chain, a benchmark for evaluating agents on chained release-level package upgrades, where each transition builds on the agent's prior codebase. To produce upgrade specifications, we design a divide-and-conquer synthesis pipeline that aligns release notes with code diffs for each version transition, ensuring the requirements are grounded in actual code changes, informative to agents, and feasible to implement. SWE-Chain contains 12 upgrade chains across 9 real Python packages, with 155 version transitions and 1,660 grounded upgrade requirements. Across nine frontier agent-model configurations, agents achieve an average of 44.8% resolving, 65.4% precision, and 50.2% F1 under the Build+Fix regime, with Claude-Opus-4.7 (Claude Code) leading at 60.8% resolving, 80.6% precision, and 68.5% F1. These results show that SWE-Chain is both feasible and discriminative, and reveal that current agents still struggle to make correct upgrades across chained package releases without breaking existing functionality.
title_zh: SWE-Chain：在链式发布级别包升级上对编码智能体进行基准测试
abstract_zh: 由大型语言模型驱动的编码代理正日益被期望执行超越孤立问题解决的现实软件维护任务。现有基准测试已转向现实的软件演化，但极少能在包发布这一粒度上捕捉连续维护——在这种粒度下，变更被捆绑、发布并被后续版本继承。我们提出SWE-Chain，一个用于评估代理在链式发布级包升级上的基准测试，其中每次转换都建立在代理先前代码库的基础上。为了生成升级规范，我们设计了一个分而治之的合成流水线，将每个版本转换的发布说明与代码差异对齐，确保需求植根于实际代码变更、对代理具有信息性且可实现。SWE-Chain包含跨越9个真实Python包的12条升级链，涉及155次版本转换和1,660条基于实际变更的升级需求。在9种前沿代理-模型配置中，代理在Build+Fix模式下平均达到44.8%的解决率、65.4%的精确率和50.2%的F1分数，其中Claude-Opus-4.7（Claude Code）以60.8%的解决率、80.6%的精确率和68.5%的F1分数领先。这些结果表明SWE-Chain既可行又有区分力，并揭示当前代理在链式包版本发布中进行正确升级而不破坏现有功能方面仍面临挑战。

title: Correctness-Aware Repository Filtering Under Maximum Effective Context Window Constraints
authors: Shweta Mishra
abstract: Context window efficiency is a practical constraint in large language model (LLM)-based developer tools. Paulsen [12] shows that all tested models degrade in accuracy well before their advertised context limits the Maximum Effective Context Window (MECW) which makes context construction a quality problem, not just a cost one. Modern software repositories routinely contain large non-code artifacts compiled datasets, binary model weights, minified JavaScript bundles, and gigabyte-scale log files that overflow the context window and push out task-relevant source code. We present a correctness-aware context hygiene framework: a pre-execution, size-based heuristic filter that intercepts repository scans before tokenization, using only OS-level stat() metadata with sub-millisecond overhead. Semantic retrieval approaches such as RepoCoder, GraphRAG, and AST-based chunking require index construction and query-time inference before any filtering decision is reached. Our framework, by contrast, requires no indexing and operates at <0.01 ms per file decision. Across 10 real open-source repositories (22,046 files, 5 languages), the proposed SizeFilter at θ=1 MB achieves 79.6% (\pm13.2%) mean token reduction at 0.30 ms overhead: the HybridFilter achieves 89.3% (\pm9.0%) the lowest variance of any filter evaluated. A token-density study across 2,688 files confirms a strong linear correlation (Pearson r=0.997, k=0.250 tokens/byte). A limited-scope evaluation (18 tasks, CodeLlama-7B-Instruct) yields 72% file-level accuracy under filtering versus 25% at baseline; hallucination frequency declines from 61% to 17%. All code and data are released for reproducibility.
title_zh: 最大有效上下文窗口约束下的正确性感知仓库过滤
abstract_zh: 基于大型语言模型（LLM）的开发者工具面临上下文窗口效率这一实际约束。Paulsen [12] 指出，所有受测模型在达到其宣传的上下文限制之前，准确性就已经显著下降——即“最大有效上下文窗口”（MECW）——这使得上下文构建不仅是一个成本问题，更是一个质量问题。现代软件仓库中通常包含大型非代码工件：已编译数据集、二进制模型权重、压缩后的JavaScript包以及GB级别的日志文件，这些内容会溢出上下文窗口，挤占与任务相关的源代码。我们提出了一种正确性感知的上下文卫生框架：一个基于大小、在标记化之前拦截仓库扫描的预执行启发式过滤器，仅利用操作系统级stat()元数据，开销低于毫秒级。语义检索方法（如RepoCoder、GraphRAG和基于AST的分块）需要在做出任何过滤决策之前构建索引并执行查询时推理。相比之下，我们的框架无需索引构建，每个文件的决策耗时低于0.01毫秒。在10个真实开源仓库（共22,046个文件，涉及5种语言）上的测试表明，所提出的SizeFilter（阈值θ=1 MB）在0.30毫秒开销下，实现了79.6%（±13.2%）的平均token缩减率；HybridFilter则实现了89.3%（±9.0%）的缩减率，且在所有评估的过滤器中方差最低。对2,688个文件的token密度研究证实了强线性相关性（Pearson r=0.997，k=0.250 tokens/byte）。在有限范围的评估（18个任务，CodeLlama-7B-Instruct）中，经过过滤后文件级准确率达到72%，而基线仅为25%；幻觉频率从61%降至17%。所有代码和数据均已公开发布，以确保可复现性。

title: Veritas: A Semantically Grounded Agentic Framework for Memory Corruption Vulnerability Detection in Binaries
authors: Xinran Zheng, Alfredo Pesoli, Marco Valleri, Suman Jana, Lorenzo Cavallaro
abstract: Detecting memory corruption vulnerabilities in stripped binaries requires recovering object semantics, interprocedural propagation, and feasible triggers from low-level, lossy representations. Recent LLM-based approaches improve code understanding, but reliable detection still requires grounding in memory-relevant semantics and runtime feasibility evidence. We present Veritas, a semantically grounded framework for binary memory corruption vulnerability detection. Veritas combines a static slicer over RetDec-lifted LLVM IR, a dual-view LLM detector that reasons step by step over grounded flows using decompiled C and selective LLVM IR, and a multi-agent validator that checks hypotheses against debugger-visible artifacts and runtime evidence. The slicer reconstructs value-flow relations from LLVM-IR facts, including def-use, calls, returns, globals, and pointer operations, and emits compact witness-backed flow objects. The detector uses these artifacts to reason about control flow, bounds, and object correspondence without rediscovering whole-binary propagation. The validator confirms or rejects candidates through guided debugging, breakpoint inspection, and memory-checking oracles. We implement Veritas as a modular pipeline and evaluate it on a curated benchmark of real-world binary vulnerability cases. Veritas achieves 90\% recall. For false-positive assessment, we exhaustively validate and manually verify 623 detector candidates and audit additional candidates from larger cases. The exhaustive subset produces no false positives, while the additional audit identifies two confirmed false positives. In a real-world application, Veritas discovered a previously unknown Apple vulnerability that was confirmed and assigned a CVE. These results support semantic grounding as an operational design principle for practical binary vulnerability detection.
title_zh: Veritas：一种基于语义的代理框架，用于检测二进制文件中的内存破坏漏洞
abstract_zh: 在剥离后的二进制文件中检测内存损坏漏洞需要从低级、有损表示中恢复对象语义、过程间传播以及可行的触发条件。近期基于大语言模型的方法提升了代码理解能力，但可靠的检测仍需依赖与内存相关的语义及运行时可行性证据。我们提出Veritas，一个语义化的二进制内存损坏漏洞检测框架。Veritas结合了基于RetDec提升的LLVM IR的静态切片器、一个双视图LLM检测器（该检测器通过反编译的C代码和选择性LLVM IR对基于语义的流进行逐步推理），以及一个多智能体验证器（通过调试器可见的工件和运行时证据来验证假设）。切片器从LLVM IR事实中重构值流关系，包括定义-使用、调用、返回、全局变量和指针操作，并生成紧凑的、附带证据的流对象。检测器利用这些工件推理控制流、边界和对象对应关系，而无需重新发现整个二进制的传播。验证器通过引导式调试、断点检查和内存检查预言机来确认或拒绝候选漏洞。我们将Veritas实现为一个模块化流水线，并在一个精心整理的现实世界二进制漏洞案例基准上进行了评估。Veritas实现了90%的召回率。在误报评估方面，我们详尽验证并手动核查了623个检测器候选，并对较大案例中的额外候选进行了审计。穷举子集未产生误报，而额外审计确认了两个误报。在一个实际应用中，Veritas发现了一个此前未知的苹果漏洞，该漏洞已被确认并分配了CVE编号。这些结果支持将语义化作为实际二进制漏洞检测的一种操作性设计原则。

title: Boosting Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards via Randomly Selected Few-Shot Guidance
authors: Kai Yan, Alexander G. Schwing, Yu-Xiong Wang
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has achieved great success in developing Large Language Models (LLMs) with chain-of-thought rollouts for many tasks such as math and coding. Nevertheless, RLVR struggles with sample efficiency on difficult problems where correct rollouts are hard to generate. Prior works propose to address this issue via demonstration-guided RLVR, i.e., to conduct Supervised FineTuning (SFT) when RL fails; however, SFT often requires a lot of data, which can be expensive to acquire. In this paper, we propose FEST, a FEw-ShoT demonstration-guided RLVR algorithm. It attains compelling results with only 128 demonstrations randomly selected from an SFT dataset. We find that three components are vital for the success: supervised signal, on-policy signal, and decaying weights on the few-shot SFT dataset to prevent overfitting from multiple-epoch training. On several benchmarks, FEST outperforms baselines with magnitudes less SFT data, even matching their performance with full dataset.
title_zh: 通过随机选择的少样本指导来提升基于可验证奖励的强化学习
abstract_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）在开发具有思维链展开能力的大型语言模型（LLM）方面取得了巨大成功，尤其在数学和编程等任务中。然而，在难以生成正确展开的困难问题上，RLVR存在样本效率低下的问题。先前的工作提出通过示范引导的RLVR来解决这一问题，即在RL失败时进行监督微调（SFT）；但SFT通常需要大量数据，获取成本高昂。本文提出FEST，一种少样本示范引导的RLVR算法。仅需从SFT数据集中随机选取128个示范样本，即可获得令人满意的结果。我们发现三个关键组件对成功至关重要：监督信号、在策略信号，以及对少样本SFT数据集施加衰减权重以防止多轮训练过拟合。在多个基准测试中，FEST使用远少于基线的SFT数据量即超越其性能，甚至在使用完整数据集时达到同等水平。

title: InfoSFT: Learn More and Forget Less with Information-Aware Token Weighting
authors: Mahdi Sabbaghi, George Pappas, Adel Javanmard, Hamed Hassani
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) provides the standard approach for teaching LLMs new behaviors from offline expert demonstrations. However, standard SFT uniformly fits all samples -- including those with low likelihood under the base model -- which can disproportionately drive training updates toward overfitting specific samples rather than learning the target behavior. Moreover, adapting to these unlikely samples induces substantial policy shifts that degrade prior capabilities. Existing methods mitigate this by filtering, regenerating, or down-weighting low-likelihood data. In doing so, they often suppress precisely the novel behaviors the base model has yet to learn. We propose InfoSFT, a principled weighting scheme for the SFT objective that concentrates learning signals on maximally informative, medium-confidence tokens -- those neither overly familiar to the base model nor too unlikely to cause instability. Requiring only a one-line modification to the standard token-wise loss, InfoSFT demonstrably improves generalization over vanilla SFT and likelihood-weighted baselines across math, code, and chain-of-thought tasks with diverse model families, while better preserving pre-existing capabilities.
title_zh: InfoSFT：通过信息感知的令牌权重实现更多学习与更少遗忘
abstract_zh: 监督微调（SFT）为从离线专家演示中教授大语言模型新行为提供了标准方法。然而，标准SFT均匀拟合所有样本——包括那些在基础模型下似然较低的样本——这可能导致训练更新不成比例地偏向于对特定样本的过拟合，而非学习目标行为。此外，适应这些低似然样本会引发显著的政策偏移，从而削弱已有能力。现有方法通过过滤、重新生成或降低低似然数据的权重来缓解这一问题。然而，这样做时，它们往往恰恰抑制了基础模型尚未学习的新颖行为。本文提出InfoSFT，一种基于原则的SFT目标加权方案，将学习信号集中于信息量最大、中等置信度的token——即那些既不过分熟悉于基础模型、又不太可能引发不稳定性。仅需对标准逐token损失进行一行修改，InfoSFT在数学、代码和思维链任务上，针对多种模型家族，相比标准SFT和基于似然加权的基线，显著提升了泛化能力，同时更好地保留了既有能力。

title: Conversion and Deployment Pipeline for Feedforward Neural Networks as Embedded Libraries on the ATmega328P
authors: Rodrigo Centeno, César Morales, Ernesto Morales
publish: 2025 IEEE 43rd Central America and Panama Convention (CONCAPAN XLIII)
abstract: This paper presents a pipeline that converts feedforward neural networks trained in TensorFlow/Keras into a C/C++ library optimized for the ATmega328P. The process automates model loading, architecture extraction, weights and biases, and the generation of a header and implementation file that place the parameters in Flash memory, minimizing SRAM usage. Integration into Arduino IDE is reduced to including the header, instantiating the network, and calling a prediction function. Validation includes cases of 5 -input digital combinations with binary classification using the Wisconsin Breast Cancer dataset. The research demonstrated the correct implementation of neural networks, the simultaneous execution of networks, and explored growing topologies to delimit practical memory limits, confirming the viability of the approach.
title_zh: 在ATmega328P上将前馈神经网络作为嵌入式库的转换与部署流水线
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种流水线方法，可将基于TensorFlow/Keras训练的前馈神经网络转换为针对ATmega328P优化的C/C++库。该过程自动完成模型加载、架构提取、权重与偏置处理，并生成将参数存储于闪存（Flash memory）的头文件和实现文件，从而最大限度减少静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）的使用。在Arduino IDE中的集成仅需包含头文件、实例化网络并调用预测函数。验证环节包括基于威斯康星州乳腺癌数据集的5输入数字组合进行二元分类的案例。研究证明了神经网络实现的正确性、网络并行执行的可行性，并通过探索增长拓扑以界定实践中的内存限制，确认了该方法的实用性。

title: Design of an Integrated Reconfigurable HMSIW Band-Pass Filter Using Metamaterial Technology
authors: Aimen Faraj Abdelhamid, Adel Saad Emhemmed, Abdulbast Kriama
publish: 2026 IEEE 5th International Maghreb Meeting of the Conference on Sciences and Techniques of Automatic Control and Computer Engineering (MI-STA)
abstract: This paper presents the design and analysis of a compact reconfigurable Half-Mode Substrate Integrated Waveguide (HMSIW) bandpass filter incorporating Complementary Split Ring Resonator (CSRR) metamaterial structures and varactor diodes. The proposed filter operates over key sub- 6 GHz bands, including 5G n77, n78, n79, and the WLAN band. The filter is designed and optimized using HFSS, starting from a full-mode SIW structure and subsequently transformed into a compact HMSIW configuration. The integration of CSRR cells enables effective miniaturization and improved selectivity, while varactor diodes provide dynamic frequency tuning and WLAN interference suppression. Simulation results demonstrate low insertion loss below 0.5 dB and return loss exceeding $\mathbf{1 5 ~ d B}$ across the operating bands, confirming the suitability of the proposed design for reconfigurable 5 G and WLAN front-end applications.
title_zh: 采用超材料技术的集成可重构半模基片集成波导带通滤波器设计
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种紧凑型可重构半模基片集成波导（HMSIW）带通滤波器的设计与分析，该滤波器融合了互补开口谐振环（CSRR）超材料结构与变容二极管。所提出的滤波器工作在关键的6 GHz以下频段，包括5G n77、n78、n79以及WLAN频段。该滤波器使用HFSS软件进行设计与优化，从全模SIW结构出发，随后转换为紧凑型HMSIW配置。CSRR单元的集成实现了有效的小型化并提升了选择性，而变容二极管则提供了动态频率调谐与WLAN干扰抑制功能。仿真结果表明，在工作频段内插入损耗低于0.5 dB，回波损耗超过15 dB，验证了所提设计在可重构5G和WLAN前端应用中的适用性。

title: Integrated Multi-Physics Optimisation of MOSFET Power Modules for Reduced Parasitic Inductance and Enhanced Thermal Reliability
authors: Thibault Jacobs
publish: 2026 27th International Conference on Thermal, Mechanical and Multi-Physics Simulation and Experiments in Microelectronics and Microsystems (EuroSimE)
abstract: Modern power modules face concurrent challenges driven by miniaturization, high power density, and thermal reliability requirements. Conventional design approaches, often fragmented across separate tools and physical domains, fail to capture crucial electro-thermal and electromagnetic interactions early in the development cycle. This leads to delayed identification of parasitic effects, reduced design efficiency, and extended development times. To address this, we present an approach that integrates schematic-driven layout, parasitic extraction, and electro-thermal co-simulation into a unified, automated workflow. Orchestrated by an Efficient Global Optimization (EGO) strategy, the methodology systematically varies key parameters, such as MOSFET placement and wire bond thickness. The sensitivity-guided exploration achieved an 18.4% reduction in total parasitic inductance and a 5.3% decrease in maximum junction temperature. This automated parametric approach provides deeper insights into electrical-thermal trade-offs, enabling earlier, reliable design evaluations for next-generation power electronics.
title_zh: MOSFET功率模块的集成多物理场优化以降低寄生电感和增强热可靠性
abstract_zh: 现代功率模块面临着小型化、高功率密度和热可靠性需求带来的多重挑战。传统设计方法往往分散于不同工具和物理域，难以在开发周期早期捕获关键的电热与电磁相互作用。这导致寄生效应的延迟识别、设计效率降低以及开发周期延长。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种将原理图驱动布局、寄生参数提取和电热协同仿真集成到统一自动化工作流中的方法。该方法以高效全局优化（EGO）策略为统筹，系统性地改变关键参数（如MOSFET布局和键合线厚度）。通过敏感性引导的探索，总寄生电感降低了18.4%，最高结温下降了5.3%。这种自动化参数化方法能够更深入地揭示电气与热性能之间的权衡，从而为下一代电力电子产品的早期可靠设计评估提供支持。
